lines: +Add a `--no-binary-patching` flag to `tauri build` and `tauri bundle`. When set, the bundler skips patching the main executable with bundle type information (and the subsequent re-signing), leaving an already-signed binary untouched. Patching is only required when shipping multiple bundle types per platform that should each update with their own installer format.

-      log::warn!("Failed to add bundler type to the binary: {e}. Updater plugin may not be able to update this package. This shouldn't normally happen, please report it to https://github.com/tauri-apps/tauri/issues");
